data.name: RT0001_Title
data.value: Static field access in [PureMethod]

data.name: RT0001_MessageFormat
data.value: Cannot access static, non-readonly field '{1}' within [PureMethod] method '{0}'

data.name: RT0001_Description
data.value: Referentially transparent methods must not access static mutable state.

data.name: RT0002_Title
data.value: Non-pure method call in [PureMethod]

data.name: RT0002_MessageFormat
data.value: Cannot call non-pure method '{1}' within [PureMethod] method '{0}'

data.name: RT0002_Description
data.value: Referentially transparent methods can only call methods marked with the [PureMethod] attribute or known pure standard library methods.

data.name: RT0003_Title
data.value: I/O operation in [PureMethod]

data.name: RT0003_MessageFormat
data.value: Cannot perform I/O operations within [PureMethod] method '{0}'

data.name: RT0003_Description
data.value: Referentially transparent methods must not perform I/O operations such as logging, file access, or network communication.

data.name: LVP0001_Title
data.value: Reassignment to immutable local variable prohibited

data.name: LVP0001_MessageFormat
data.value: Cannot reassign a value to immutable local variable '{0}'

data.name: LVP0001_Description
data.value: Local variables starting with an underscore (_) are treated as immutable, and reassignment after declaration is prohibited.

data.name: LVP0002_Title
data.value: Mandatory initialization of immutable local variable

data.name: LVP0002_MessageFormat
data.value: Immutable local variable '{0}' must be initialized at the time of declaration

data.name: LVP0002_Description
data.value: Local variables starting with an underscore (_) are treated as immutable and must be assigned an initial value upon declaration.

data.name: LVP0003_Title
data.value: Suggestion to apply naming convention for immutable local variable

data.name: LVP0003_MessageFormat
data.value: Local variable '{0}' is effectively immutable. Consider starting its name with an underscore '_'.

data.name: LVP0003_Description
data.value: Local variables that are never reassigned can have their immutability explicitly shown by starting their name with an underscore (_).

data.name: FIF0001_Title
data.value: FluentIf chain termination check

data.name: FIF0001_MessageFormat
data.value: FluentIf chain must be terminated with '.Else(...)'

data.name: FIF0001_Description
data.value: Method chains starting with Fluent.If() must always end with .Else().
